# ExtensionConfig.Media.Queues.Hdr

**Object**

Headers to include with requests to media endpoints.

## Declaration

```swift
object ExtensionConfig.Media.Queues.Hdr
```

## Discussion

This is a dictionary of header names and values.

## Specifying Request Headers

- **ExtensionConfig.Hdr**: Headers to include with all requests to the media service.
- **ExtensionEndpointConfig.Hdr**: Headers to include with requests to intent endpoints.
- **ExtensionConfig.Intent.Hdr**: Headers to include with requests to intent endpoints.
- **ExtensionConfig.Media.Queues.PlayMedia.Hdr**: Headers to include with requests to media endpoints.
- **ExtensionConfig.Media.Queues.UpdateActivity.Hdr**: Headers to include with requests to the update activity endpoint.
